zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Thompson於1636年1月21日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親David Thompson45歲，母親Marion Meek25歲。她於1655年6月4日與David William Lynn Linn在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可拉莫德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Thompson was born on 21 January 1636, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Thompson, was 45 and her mother, Marion Meek, was 25. She married David William Lynn Linn on 4 June 1655, in Cramond, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Thompson est née le 21 janvier 1636, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Thompson, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Marion Meek, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé David William Lynn Linn le 4 juin 1655, à Cramond, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

Lei sposato David William Lynn Linn il 4 giugno 1655, nel Cramond, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Thompson(이)가 1636년 1월 21일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Thompson(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Meek(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1655년 6월 4일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 크램드에서 David William Lynn Linn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Thompson родилась 21 января 1636 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Thompson было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Meek, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David William Lynn Linn 4 июня 1655 г. в местности крамонд, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.
